title: Chapter 83
content:
Chapter 83: Chapter 83: Earth Spirit Realm

Damon now sit on the edge of the bed. On the bed the girls are collapsed naked while covered in his cum.

Looking at the scenery Damon couldn’t help but to smile with pride and satisfaction in his heart.

Then he shift his focus to toward the bunch of notification in front of his eyes.

[Selene Frostborn’s Interest reaches 1000/1000, new relationship level unlocked, +4000 lust points!]

[Selene Frostborn’s Relationship change from Taking an interest to In Love, +100000 lust points!]

[Now, point gains from Selene Frostborn will be multiplied by 3]

[You made a woman that have two realm higher cultivation than you masturbate, +30000 lust points]

[You made a woman that have two realm higher cultivation than you masturbate, +30000 lust points]

[You made a woman that have two realm higher cultivation than you masturbate, +30000 lust points]

[You made a woman that have two realm higher cultivation than you, climax, +50000 lust points]

[You made a woman that have two realm higher cultivation than you, climax, +50000 lust points]

[You made a woman that have two realm higher cultivation than you, climax, +50000 lust points]

[...]

...

...

’Damn girl! How hard is she masturbate to had a climax that many times?’ Damon shocked to see so many notifications of Selene’s climax.

But the shock only briefly because Damon new that Selene has been used to the pleasure and wanting more since she had to watched another woman having a pleasure of her life right next door every night for a week.

Then he spread his spiritual sense and Incubus Celestial Eyes through the wall to the room next door expecting that Selene was there.

He can just use spiritual sense just to look but there is a difference once he found out the Incubus Celestial Eyes true power.

Not only it can open the status of his target and see far, it also can see through the wall, see through a body to see the target dantian and qi channel.

It also help him analyze his opponent movement, how they move their qi in their body while fighting. So it basically an enhance x-ray vision. But he need to focus on it to be activated.

And as expected Selene was sleeping in her naked body with her legs spread wide open. He can see a streak of damp spot right in front of her pink pussy.

"Just a little bit more, I will wait until she ask for it herself.’ Damon thought internally.

Then her new status appear in front of him.

[Name: Selene Frostborn]

[Age: 35]

[Cultivation: Heavenly Spirit Realm - Ninth Level]

[Relationship: In Love]

[Interest: 15/1000]

[Chastity: Intact]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Ice: 65, Sword: 100]

[Spiritual Roots: Glacial Sword Spiritual Roots] [Heaven Grade - Low]

[Bloodline: N/A]

[Physique: Body of Ice Monarch] [Earth Grade - Peak]

[Traits: Cold, Sword Freak, Repressed Desire, Proud, Natural Sword Master]

[Desire: "Ahh... I want to feel it inside me too... No, Selene you need to focus on your sword only... but that also count as a sword right...?"]

’Look like her trait conflicting with each other, while the Sword Freak what her focus on her sword training, while her Repressed Desire trait want her to explore the new sensation that she had been felling.’ Damon thought after looking at her desire.

’I will take care on the later.’ Then open his status to look his point that he get all this week.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - Second Level]

[True Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - Ninth Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 65, Water: 65, Ice: 65, Wind: 65, Earth: 65, Lightning: 315, Nature: 65, Light: 65, Dark: 65, Sword: 100] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Heaven Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 1,755,000]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria, Mio Nightrider, Mia Nightrider]

[Beasts Bonds: Neko [Heavenly White Tiger]]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Celestial Eyes, Polymorph]

His cultivation is adjusted to match Ariel’s pace so he won’t make anything abnormal in the world view.

He can just let out and his real cultivation and make himself as the greatest genius, but it will only attract unwanted attention and trouble.

Even right now the trouble come to him without him doing anything, like Kai Reventon.

Since he only can use normal cultivation for stabilize hid cultivation and he only can grow stronger by having sex, if trouble come it only make his time with the girls lessen.

Also there is more stronger people in this world, like the twin’s mother, Mei Nightrider.

For now he plan to keep rising his cultivation and hide his actual cultivation for emergency.

So Damon can be seen as low level cultivator by his peers and get underestimated, that way he can use it as a chance to get rid of this enemy faster.

’I already got 1 mil of lust point, I should do some upgrade. Those lackeys Kai was Ninth Level of Earth Spirit Realm... I should match him.’

’Tck! What an arrogant man, he was weaker that Selene but still forcing her to get engaged with him using his family. As expected of stereotype on a young master of cultivation world.’

’System, How much is it for me to advance to Ninth Level of Earth Spirit Realm?’

[It will cost 100,000 lust point just to breakthrough to Earth Spirit Realm, and for First Level to Second Level cost you 1000 lust point and after that it will double the cost as usual.]

’I see... So it will cost around 350 k lust point huh...’

’System, what about my Incubus Lord bloodline, when I can upgrade it to Earth Grade?’

[You can already can upgrade it once you reach Earth Spirit Realm, but to completely negate the side effect. System suggest host wait until host reach Heavenly Spirit Realm.]

’I see... I got it, For now, advance my cultivation to Earth Spirit Realm.’

[Cultivation increased! Ninth Level of the True Spirit Realm → First Level of the Earth Spirit Realm. -100000 lust points.]
